top_signals.title: Strengthening gender-inclusive maritime leadership
top_signals.summary: The 2026 Gender-inclusive Leadership in Maritime training course, delivered by the World Maritime University (WMU) in partnership with IMO and the Women’s International Shipping & Trading Association (WISTA International), concluded on 8 July. The programme brought together 23 maritime professionals from 18 countries to strengthen leadership capacity and advance gender-inclusive approaches across the maritime sector. ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Greek Maritime Golf Event returns on September 4-6, at Costa Navarino
top_signals.summary: Greek Maritime Golf Event, the top golf event for the maritime community, returns for its 12th year, on September 4-6, 2026, at Costa Navarino, in Messinia. This year, the tournament will be held exclusively at The Dunes Course, the course named “Greece’s Best Golf Course 2025” at the World Golf Awards 2025. This prestigious golf ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Vitol expands physical deliveries in Pakistan
top_signals.summary: Global bunker supplier Vitol Bunkers has started offering physical deliveries of conventional marine fuels at Gwadar Port in Pakistan. Gwadar Port is a deep-sea port on the Arabian Sea, located at the gateway to the Persian Gulf just outside the Strait of Hormuz. “…for the first time in the port’s history, commercial vessels will be ...
